message:
fix: add python3 and rsync to Docker prerequisites, increase timeout

- Added python3 to fix bv and caam installers that need it for
  GitHub API metadata parsing
- Added rsync to fix rch installer dependency
- Increased prerequisite installation timeout from 120s to 180s
  to accommodate the larger package set

Full 41-installer run: 30 pass, 11 fail. The 11 failures are
legitimate ACFS installer issues (broken URLs, missing non-interactive
flags, interactive prompts, exit code bugs, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
